knowledge_base.response: 🔧 Internet Speed Issues To improve your internet speed: 1️⃣ Restart your router (wait 30 seconds) 2️⃣ Check all cable connections 3️⃣ Run speed test at speedtest.net 4️⃣ Reduce connected devices If problem persists, contact support.
🔐 WiFi Information Default credentials: • SSID: UniqueNetwork_XXXX • Password: unique@123 To change WiFi password: 1. Open browser 2. Type 192.168.1.1 3. Login: admin/admin 4. Go to Wireless Settings
